title: Sump Return-Line Flow Law — extrapolating symbolic regression over a reef-tank plumbing rig
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training return flow (ignores structure) -> ~0.1
linear least squares y~1+x1+x2+x3+x4: captures the trend, misses the head-decay exponential / bore square-law / throttle*restriction interaction, extrapolates poorly onto the over-range frontier
structured basis [1, x1*exp(c*x2), x3^2, x1*x4, x3] with a grid search over the hidden exponential head-decay rate c, coefficients by least squares
alternatives: finer / continuous optimisation of c, ridge-regularised bases, or adding cross terms to trade the complexity penalty against held-out error
